backstory.original: Once the noble guardian of the ancient elven empire of Illefarn, a cataclysmic event twisted this protector, binding him to the corrupting influence of the Shadow Weave. Now, as the King of Shadows, he commands legions of spectral Shadow Reavers and wields potent shadow magic. Driven by a warped sense of purpose tied to Illefarn's downfall and the dangerous power of the Shadow Weave, he seeks to engulf Neverwinter and beyond in an eternal night. His very being embodies the perversion of ancient power and the terrifying potential of unchecked darkness, making him a uniquely formidable and tragic antagonist.
backstory.display: 他曾经是古老精灵帝国伊尔法兰高贵的守护者，一场灾难性事件扭曲了这位保护者，将他束缚在了暗影魔网的腐化影响之中。如今，成为了暗影之王的他，指挥着幽灵暗影掠夺者大军，并能施展强大的暗影魔法。他有着一种扭曲的使命感，这是与伊尔法兰的覆灭以及暗影魔网的危险力量紧密相关的，在这种使命感的驱使下，他试图让无冬城——乃至更辽阔的世界——都被永恒的黑夜吞没。他的存在本身就代表了被扭曲的古老力量以及不受约束的黑暗所蕴含的可怕潜能，这使得他成为了既强大又可悲的独特对手。

description.original: The King of Shadows slashes the closest enemies, then blasts the enemy with the most health.
description.display: 暗影之王先劈砍距离最近的敌人，然后轰击生命值最高的敌人。

description.original: The King of Shadows blasts all enemies, slowing their movement.
description.display: 暗影之王轰击所有敌人，减缓他们的行动。

longDescription.original: The King of Shadows blasts all enemies with cold and necrotic energies, slowing their movement for a short while.
longDescription.display: 暗影之王用寒霜和死灵能量轰击所有敌人，短时间内减缓他们的行动。

description.desc: The King of Shadows is Undead and counts as 'dead' for the purposes of effects that care about dead Champions, but 'alive' for all other purposes.
暗影之王是亡灵，对于影响死亡勇士的效果，他被视为“死亡”，但对于所有其他效果则被视为“存活”。

When you complete an area with the King of Shadows leading the formation from the front, he updates his current Toughness and Brutality stacks to the completed area number. When the King of Shadows is defeated for the first time, he immediately returns to full health, his Toughness stacks no longer update, and he enters Phase Two. When the King of Shadows is defeated for the second time, he immediately returns to full health, his Brutality stacks no longer update, and he enters Phase Three. His size increases by $amount% each time he enters a new phase. Other abilities grant additional buffs upon gaining these new phases.

conditions.desc: ^^Toughness Stacks: $(stat_value kos_toughness_stacks 1 none)^Brutality Stacks: $(stat_value kos_brutality_stacks 1 none)

description.desc: 当你让暗影之王在最前列带领阵型完成一个区域后，他会把他当前的“坚韧”和“残暴”堆叠层数更新为完成的这个区域的编号。当暗影之王第一次被击败后，他会立刻恢复满血状态，他的“坚韧”堆叠层数不会再更新，并且他会进入第二阶段。当暗影之王第二次被击败后，他会立刻恢复满血状态，他的“残暴”堆叠层数不会再更新，并且他会进入第三阶段。每进入一个新的阶段，他的体型会增大 $amount%。在他进入这些新的阶段后，其他技能会带来额外的增益。

conditions.desc: ^“坚韧”堆叠层数：$(stat_value kos_toughness_stacks 1 none)^“残暴”堆叠层数：$(stat_value kos_brutality_stacks 1 none)

tipText.original: The King of Shadows goes through three phases, and he enters the next phase when he is defeated for the first and second time. His Tanking and DPS abilities improve the longer you can keep him undefeated!
tipText.display: 暗影之王会经历三个阶段，他在第一次和第二次被击败后会进入下一个阶段。你让他存活得越久，他的坦克和伤害输出技能就会变得越强！

description.desc: The King of Shadows increases the damage of himself and Champions in the two columns behind him by $king_of_shadows_power_king%. This is increased by $(amount___3)% each time the King of Shadows' max health is doubled, stacking multiplicatively.
暗影之王会使他自身以及他后方两列中勇士的伤害提高 $king_of_shadows_power_king%。暗影之王的最大生命值每翻一倍，该数值会提高 $(amount___3)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: The King of Shadows increases his own damage and the damage of Champions in the two columns behind him.
tipText.display: 暗影之王会使他自身以及他后方两列中勇士的伤害提高。

description.desc: The King of Shadows damages all adjacent Champions for $damage_percent% of their max health each second, as long as the Champions have at least $health_min_percent% of their max health remaining. Each time The King of Shadows successfully deals damage in this manner, he gains a Shadow Plague stack. Each Shadow Plague stack increases his own max health by $(amount___2)%, stacking additively. Stacks cap at $(max_stacks___2) and reset when changing areas.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: $target takes $damage_percent% of their max health each second, as long as $target has at least $health_min_percent% of their max health remaining

description.desc: 只要所有与暗影之王相邻的勇士所剩余的生命值不低于他们最大生命值的 $health_min_percent%，那么暗影之王每秒会对他们造成相当于他们最大生命值 $damage_percent% 的伤害。每当暗影之王成功以这种方式造成伤害，他会堆叠一层“暗影疫病”。每层“暗影疫病”会使他自身的最大生命值增加 $(amount___2)%，以加算方式堆叠。堆叠层数上限为 $(max_stacks___2)，并会在变更区域时重置.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 只要$target的剩余生命值不低于其最大生命值的 $health_min_percent%，那么$target每秒会受到相当于其最大生命值 $damage_percent% 的伤害

description.desc: After the King of Shadows enters Phase Two, his health is increased by $(amount___2)% for each Toughness stack he collected, stacking additively. He also increases the health of all other Champions by $(amount___3)% of his max health, and healing effects on all Champions are increased by $(amount___4)%.
在暗影之王进入第二阶段之后，他每拥有一层“坚韧”，他的生命值增加 $(amount___2)%，以加算方式堆叠。他还会增加所有其他勇士的生命值，数值相当于他最大生命值的 $(amount___3)%，并且所有勇士的治疗效果提高 $(amount___4)%。
The King of Shadows attacks all enemies with an explosion of magical cold and necrotic energies, dealing ultimate damage and slowing their movement by 50% for 30 seconds.
暗影之王用魔法寒霜和死灵能量爆炸攻击所有敌人，造成杀招伤害，并使他们的行动速度减慢 50%，持续 30 秒。

After the King of Shadows enters Phase Two, he summons a Shadow Reaver each time he uses his ultimate. An additional Shadow Reaver is summoned for every $reaver_per_toughness Toughness stacks he has. Each Shadow Reaver attacks a random enemy once every $attack_cooldown seconds dealing $seconds_of_bud seconds of BUD-based damage. The Shadow Reavers last for $base_duration second plus $duration_per_toughness seconds for each Toughness stack he has. Using his ultimate again before the Shadow Reavers expire causes their duration to be refreshed to max.

在暗影之王进入第二阶段之后，每次当他使用杀招时，他会召唤一个暗影掠夺者。他每拥有 $reaver_per_toughness 层“坚韧”，就会额外召唤一个暗影掠夺者。每隔 $attack_cooldown 秒，每个暗影掠夺者会随机攻击一名敌人一次，造成等同于 $seconds_of_bud 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害。暗影掠夺者存续的基础时间为 $base_duration 秒，此外他每拥有一层“坚韧”就额外增加 $duration_per_toughness 秒。在暗影掠夺者消失前再次使用他的杀招会使暗影掠夺者的存续时间刷新为最大值。
After the King of Shadows enters Phase Three, his damage is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)% for each Brutality stack, stacking multiplicatively.
在暗影之王进入第三阶段之后，他每拥有一层“残暴”，他的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
Increases the effect of Power of the King by $amount%.
“王之力量”的效果提高 $amount%。

specializationDescription.original: The King of Shadows focuses on supporting his underlings in the formation.
specializationDescription.display: 暗影之王专注于支援他在阵型中的手下。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Phase Three: The Warrior by $amount%.
“第三阶段：战士”的效果提高 $amount%。

specializationDescription.original: The King of Shadows prioritizes his own abilities to deal massive amounts of damage to his enemies.
specializationDescription.display: 暗影之王优先让他自身的技能对敌人造成大量伤害。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Power of the King by $amount% for each Elf, Dwarf, Half-Elf, and/or Human Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位精灵、矮人、半精灵和/或人类勇士，“王之力量”的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: The Guardian was created to defend Illefarn, an ancient elven kingdom that welcomed Dwarves and Humans into its domain. That directive still lingers, though the Guardian has long since been corrupted into the King of Shadows.
specializationDescription.display: 守护者诞生的使命是守卫伊尔法兰——那是一个欢迎矮人和人类进入其领地的古老精灵王国。该指令依然残存，但守护者早已腐化成暗影之王。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Power of the King by $amount% for each Evil Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位邪恶阵营勇士，“王之力量”的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: The fall of Mystryl shattered the weave, forcing the Guardian of Illefarn to bind himself to the Shadow Weave to survive. In doing so, he became the King of Shadows.
specializationDescription.display: 密丝瑞尔的陷落让魔网变得支离破碎，伊尔法兰守护者不得不与暗影魔网融合，以求生存。他因此成为了暗影之王。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Power of the King by $amount% for each Champion with the Healing role, stacking multiplicatively. Additionally, Shadow Plague no longer has a minimum health at which Champions will not be damaged, and the Shadow Plague stack cap is doubled.
每有一位拥有治疗角色定位的勇士，“王之力量”的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。此外，“暗影疫病”不再有勇士不会受到伤害的最低生命值阀值，并且“暗影疫病”的堆叠层数上限翻倍。

specializationDescription.original: The King of Shadows will survive by any means necessary, even if it means sacrificing those who stand beside him.
specializationDescription.display: 暗影之王会为了生存不择手段，哪怕牺牲他身边的同伴也在所不惜。

description.original: Sever your ties and protect something greater than yourself...
description.display: 斩断羁绊，守护比你自己更重大的事物……

description.original: Frightened mortals clamor for one to lead them, to protect them...
description.display: 惊恐的凡人叫嚷着，希望有人来带领他们，保护他们……

description.original: I see into your mortal heart, and all that guides your actions...
description.display: 我看透了你的凡人之心，以及引导你行动的一切……

effects.description: Increases the effect of King of Shadows' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: Ambition and evil brought you here...
description.display: 野心和邪恶把你带到了这里……

effects.description: Increases the effect of King of Shadows' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: You need not die... You need not be cleansed...
description.display: 你不需要死……你不需要被清洗……

effects.description: Increases the effect of King of Shadows' Power of the King ability whenever his max health is doubled by $amount% (pre-stack)

description.original: They believe they can be saved... That they should be saved...
description.display: 他们相信他们可以被拯救……他们应该被拯救……

effects.description: Increases the effect of King of Shadows' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: I will eliminate all who stand before me...
description.display: 我会消灭所有阻拦我的人……

effects.description: Increases the effect of King of Shadows' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: Let us continue with the cleansing...

effects.description: Increases the effect of King of Shadows' first set of Specializations by $amount%

description.original: Do not mourn... In death, all shall serve Illefarn and protect it...
description.display: 不要哀痛……众生死后皆将侍奉伊尔法兰并守护它……

effects.description: Increases the effect of King of Shadows' second set of Specializations by $amount%

description.original: Neverwinter shall fall before the moon waxes...
description.display: 无冬城将在月盈之前陷落……

effects.description: King of Shadows' attacks have a $(amount)% chance to taunt enemies

description.original: The light of the empire fades... I am what remains...
description.display: 帝国的光芒消失了……只剩下我了……

character_sheet_details.backstory: Once the noble guardian of the ancient elven empire of Illefarn, a cataclysmic event twisted this protector, binding him to the corrupting influence of the Shadow Weave. Now, as the King of Shadows, he commands legions of spectral Shadow Reavers and wields potent shadow magic. Driven by a warped sense of purpose tied to Illefarn's downfall and the dangerous power of the Shadow Weave, he seeks to engulf Neverwinter and beyond in an eternal night. His very being embodies the perversion of ancient power and the terrifying potential of unchecked darkness, making him a uniquely formidable and tragic antagonist.
character_sheet_details.system_description: The King of Shadows is a Support, Tanking and DPS Champion that goes through three phases, with the advancement to the next phase happening when he is defeated. The power of his Tanking and DPS abilities increase the longer you can delay his advancement to the next phase. His Shadow Plague ability further augments his Tanking abilities, but actively drains health from Champions next to him in formation!

character_sheet_details.backstory: 他曾经是古老精灵帝国伊尔法兰高贵的守护者，一场灾难性事件扭曲了这位保护者，将他束缚在了暗影魔网的腐化影响之中。如今，成为了暗影之王的他，指挥着幽灵暗影掠夺者大军，并能施展强大的暗影魔法。他有着一种扭曲的使命感，这是与伊尔法兰的覆灭以及暗影魔网的危险力量紧密相关的，在这种使命感的驱使下，他试图让无冬城——乃至更辽阔的世界——都被永恒的黑夜吞没。他的存在本身就代表了被扭曲的古老力量以及不受约束的黑暗所蕴含的可怕潜能，这使得他成为了既强大又可悲的独特对手。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 暗影之王是一名支援、坦克和伤害输出型勇士，他会经历三个阶段，每当他被击败后，他会进入下一个阶段。你越晚让他进入下一个阶段，他的坦克和伤害输出技能就越强。他的“暗影疫病”技能会进一步强化他的坦克技能，但会持续吸取阵型中与他相邻勇士的生命值！

original.description: The King of Shadows slashes the closest enemies, then blasts the enemy with the most health.

display.name: 暗影攻击
display.description: 暗影之王先劈砍距离最近的敌人，然后轰击生命值最高的敌人。
